'''Vexa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] and a member of the same tribe that [[Sliven]] led. She resented Sliven since he had adopted a [[Human/Legends|Human]] girl named [[Tahiri Veila]] into his tribe in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. However, she allowed him to take her into the tribe and Sliven to remain leader if he promised that she be taken into the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] at the age of nine to undergo a week-long survival quest without food or water.

Thus, when Tahiri returned with [[Anakin Solo]] from the [[Jedi Praxeum]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], she underwent this quest. Both Jedi prevailed due to their growing [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers. In the end, Sliven remained the leader of his tribe.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'' {{1st}}
